prompts.prompt: How is PR-opened detected?: Explicit CLI verb: brain pr <slug> --url <github-pr-url>

prompts.prompt: Let's do simple single-feature since if we're doing multiple feature it's probably gonna be on a different worktree, we can probably jhust spin up a different host?
prompts.text:
Multi-feature index at /watch (list all features + stages) — now, or a later addendum once the single-feature page proves out?
      xrestore

prompts.prompt: Right now let's focus on the current execution, a separate command will view all the plans later on
prompts.text:
Should the dashboard also fold in the v3-banked "browse all plans/review sessions" surface, or stay execution-only?
      xrestore

prompts.prompt: I think it doesn't matter - it depends how the harness wants to handle it
prompts.text:
Stage ordering: must "shipped" precede "PR opened", or can a PR open first (ship-after-merge workflows)? Current plan renders whichever arrives, no enforcement.
      xrestore
